title: Creamy Crunchy Filipino Kippers Fried Rice
description: A resinous and bouncy Filipino dish featuring kippers, perfect for meal prep, and egg-free friendly. This recipe combines the flavors of kippers with the crunch of fried rice.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the flaked kippers and cook for about 2 minutes, until heated through.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet or wok, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice mixture for about 5 minutes, until everything is well combined and heated through.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and calamansi juice to the rice mixture, stirring to combine.
Use the crushed ice to deglaze the skillet or wok, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
